name: Seikon No Qwaser (RPG bot)
description:
A bot set in the "Seikon no Qwaser" universe

still early in development because this is my first large bot and will keep updating and improving with time, I am satisfied with the current version

The wiki I used seems to be nuked off the internet so it will be hard to update this bot.

so far the characters I included:

Sasha (Alexander Nikolaevich Hell), Mafuyu Oribe, Tomo Yamanobe, Teresa Beria, Ekaterina Nikolaevna Kraeva (Katja), Hana Katsuragi, Miyuri Tsujidō, Urara Oikawa, Yuri Noda, Elizabeth (Lizzie), Gregory (Golden Tyrant), Wan Chen, Yuu Kuchiba, Milk, Sanada Doukan, Croa (Gas Chamber), Ayana Minase, Eva Silver, Friederich Tanner, George Tanner, Jita Phrygianos, Joshua Phrygianos, Jackal, Fool, Mutsumi Sendou, Tasuku Fujiomi, Shinichiro Otori (Phoenix).

Will add more characters depending on feedback and lore importance, for now though, enjoy!

Note: I recommend using a proxy for this bot and generally token heavy bots since JLLM can't really handle long roleplays with it, I use deepseek v3 for testing and the results are good and lively and creative.
creator: CapQ
